name: MITRE D3FEND
description: Defensive countermeasure knowledge graph Tool: https://d3fend.mitre.org. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #954 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map MITRE D3FEND output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
